zh.lifeSummary: 當Dame Alice Sherburne於大約1408年出生在英國越可爾米頓時，她的父親Richard Sherburne28歲，母親Agnes Harington18歲。她於大約1420年與Sir John Tempest在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1465年之前在英國越可爾，埋葬在英國藍卡爾布拉可維爾。

zh-hans.Bracewell, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾布拉可維爾

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dame Alice Sherburne于大约1408年出生在英国越可爾米頓时，她的父亲Richard Sherburne28岁，母亲Agnes Harington18岁。她于大约1420年与Sir John Tempest在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1465年之前在英国越可爾，埋葬在英国藍卡爾布拉可維爾。

nameMeanings.name: Sherburne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from any of several places called with Old English scīr ‘bright, clear’ + burna ‘stream’, including Sherburn in Elmet (Yorkshire), Sherburn (East Yorkshire, Durham), Shirburn (Oxfordshire), Sherborne (Dorset, Gloucestershire), Sherborne Saint John, Monk Sherborne (Hampshire), Sherbourne (Warwickshire), Sherbourne in Albury (Surrey), and Sherborne in Litton (Somerset). This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Sherbon
meanings: English: variant of Sherburne with loss of the second -r- by dissimilation. This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Dame Alice Sherburne was born about 1408, in Mitton, Yorkshire, England, her father, Richard Sherburne, was 28 and her mother, Agnes Harington, was 18. She married Sir John Tempest about 1420, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. She died before 1465, in Yorkshire, England, and was buried in Bracewell, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dame Alice Sherburne est née environ 1408, à Mitton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Richard Sherburne, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Agnes Harington, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Tempest environ 1420, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée avant 1465, à Everwyck, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Bracewell, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dame Alice Sherburne um 1408 in Mitton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Sherburne 28 und ihre Mutter Agnes Harington 18. Sie hat um 1420 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Sir John Tempest geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb vor 1465 in Yorkshire, England und wurde in Bracewell, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dame Alice Sherburne è nata il circa 1408 nel Mitton, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Richard Sherburne, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Agnes Harington, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Tempest circa 1420, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie. Morì prima del 1465, nel Yorkshire, England, e fu sepolta a Bracewell, Lancashire, England.

ja.Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.Mitton, Lancashire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアミットオン
ja.Bracewell, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアブレイセウエル
ja.Saint Michael's Church, Bracewell, Lanca: イギリスランカシュアイアブレイセウエル
ja.Stonyhurst, Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイアストニーハルスト
ja.lifeSummary: Dame Alice Sherburneが約1408年にイギリスヨークシュアイアミットオンで生まれた時，父Richard Sherburneは28歳，母Agnes Haringtonは18歳であった。約1420年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでSir John Tempestと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1465年以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアで死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアブレイセウエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Dame Alice Sherburne(이)가 대략 1408년 영국 요르크실르 미턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Sherburne(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Harington(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 대략 1420년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Sir John Tempest(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1465년 이전 영국 요르크실르에서 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 브라스웰에 묻혔다.

pt.from 29 November 1463 to 8 February 1464: de 29 de novembro de 1463 a 8 de fevereiro de 1464
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dame Alice Sherburne nasceu aproximadamente 1408, em Mitton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Sherburne, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Harington, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Tempest aproximadamente 1420, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 1465, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Bracewell, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dame Alice Sherburne родилась около 1408 г. в местности миттон, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Sherburne было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Harington, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Tempest около 1420 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла перед 1465 г. в местности еркшир, Англия и была похоронена в местности бреисюелл, ланкашир, Англия.

Se casó con Sir John Tempest aproximadamente 1420, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 6 hijas.
